title: Implement BLE IPSP transport binding for LCI
description: Implement BLE transport per LCI spec 17.3.2: Internet Protocol Support Profile (IPSP) for IPv6 over BLE (RFC 7668). Enables standard IPv6 stack on phone/laptop to talk CoAP to node. Requires Zephyr BLE + IPSP config. Test with Linux BLE + ping6/coap-client.
acceptance_criteria: Phone or laptop can ping6 and coap-client to node over BLE IPSP
close_reason: Implemented BLE SLIP transport (16.6KB), NUS UUID, test suite, Kconfig
